prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次约 25941→23098→21690→66810→38498，2024 年因新高考改革首年批次合并出现位次大幅后移，2025 年已部分回归至约 38498 名，近 2 年波动较大；该校在河南省理科/物理类招生计划 2021–2025 年分别为 131→131→133→138→132 人，2026 年计划 166 人，较 2025 年扩招约 25.8%，扩招幅度显著，竞争压力有所缓解但位次数字预计后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年约第 113 名，近年排名在 99–113 之间小幅波动，整体层次稳定；该校在声誉舆情文件中无显著负面或正面事件记录，声誉平稳；抖音热度总排名第 50 位（较热），2023 年曾位列第 11 位（高热），短视频曝光度较高，对报考关注有温和升温作用；第五轮学科评估；该校以航海、交通运输为特色，相关专业在行业内认可度高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，与该校优势工科方向匹配；河南省 2026 年考生总数约 120 万（不确定标记），较 2025 年约 90.7 万大幅增加，竞争加剧；该校位于辽宁省大连市，非本省高校，无本地招生倾斜；河南省为生源大省，考生基数大，跨省报考热度受学校层次和地域综合影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 38498 名、2026 年大幅扩招约 25.8%（位次数字后移）、河南省考生总数显著增加（竞争加剧）以及抖音热度较高等因素，预计 2026 年最低录取位次约 44548 名，区间 44048–45048 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 Science/Physics Category minimum rankings approximately 25941→23098→21690→66810→38498, in 2024 due to the first year of the new college entrance examination reform batch merger, rankings significantly shifted backward, in 2025 partially returned to approximately 38498, with large fluctuations in the past 2 years; the university's enrollment plan in Henan Province for Science/Physics Category from 2021–2025 was 131→131→133→138→132 respectively, with a 2026 plan of 166, an increase of about 25.8% compared to 2025, a significant expansion, easing competition pressure but rankings are expected to shift backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking 2026 approximately 113th, recent rankings fluctuate between 99–113, overall level stable; the university has no significant negative or positive event records in reputation public opinion files, reputation stable; Douyin heat total ranking 50th (relatively hot), in 2023 ranked 11th (high heat), short video exposure high, has a mild warming effect on application attention; fifth round discipline evaluation; the university is characterized by navigation and transportation, related majors have high recognition in the industry.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other engineering majors have consistently high social popularity, matching the university's advantageous engineering directions; Henan Province 2026 total number of examinees approximately 1.2 million (uncertain mark), a significant increase from about 907,000 in 2025, intensifying competition; the university is located in Dalian, Liaoning Province, not a local university, no local enrollment preference; Henan is a major source province with a large base of examinees, cross-province application heat is comprehensively influenced by university level and region.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 38498, a significant enrollment expansion of about 25.8% in 2026 (ranking numbers shift backward), a notable increase in total examinees in Henan Province (intensified competition), and high Douyin heat, the predicted 2026 minimum admission ranking is approximately 44548, with a range of 44048–45048.
